message:
bd-4r1ep: Monitor + Down Notifications for SPORK supervision

Implement OTP-style monitors with deterministic Down notification delivery:

- Add MonitorRef type (monotone counter, Ord for deterministic containers)
- Add Down struct with sort_key() for (vt, tid) ordering per DOWN-ORDER
- Add MonitorTable with BTreeMap-based storage (no HashMap iteration order)
  - monitor(watcher, region, monitored) -> MonitorRef
  - demonitor(ref) -> bool
  - notify_down(task, outcome, vt) -> sorted Vec<Down> (DOWN-BATCH)
  - notify_down_batch() for multi-task quantum delivery
  - cleanup_region() for DOWN-CLEANUP contract
  - watchers_of(), watcher_for(), monitored_for() queries
- Add MonitorEvent enum for trace observability
- 18 new tests covering lifecycle, ordering, batch delivery, cleanup

Implements contracts from bd-12qan: DOWN-ORDER, DOWN-BATCH, DOWN-CLEANUP.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
